events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer and co-founder of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV Memories
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever! What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in the UK on August 29, 1994, featuring iconic tracks like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! Which track from their debut album still gets you singing along loudest?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, three days of peace and music, took place from August 15-18, 1969, on a dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off! What era-defining track from that weekend is still on your playlist?

events.title: Tribute to Elvis Presley (would have been 91)
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: King Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His music truly lives forever.

events.title: Tribute to Tupac Shakur (would have been 55)
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by in Las Vegas, tragically passing away six days later on September 13. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His words and music continue to resonate today.

events.title: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix (would have been 84)
events.blurb: Guitar icon Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, in London, at the age of 27. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Jimi Hendrix, who redefined the electric guitar and left us far too soon. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'! That album cover is still one of the most famous in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, American-British singer, songwriter, and founding member of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, best known as the lead singer of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester, England.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your top track from the iconic frontman?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, with the album following on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released the powerful anthem 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity is as relevant as ever.

events.title: First iPod released anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it began shipping on November 10, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Tech Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? On this day, we're looking back at the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music consumption forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Which Bond theme song is your absolute favourite? Licence to thrill!

events.title: Tribute to John Lennon (would have been 86)
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool. He would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His message of peace continues to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, screenwriter, and Monty Python co-founder John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?
